headline: Pfizer Oncology Data At ASCO 2026 Reshapes Long Term Growth Story
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) reported breakthrough Phase 3 results for its BRAFTOVI combination in first-line metastatic colorectal cancer and TALZENNA combination in metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer, presented at ASCO 2026. The BREAKWATER trial of BRAFTOVI with cetuximab and FOLFIRI in BRAF V600E mutated metastatic colorectal cancer showed strong efficacy signals in progression-free and overall survival. The TALAPRO-3 study of TALZENNA with XTANDI in hormone-sensitive prostate cancer...
